introSection: Factory Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse indoor roller coaster currently located at Moon Toon in Jeddah, Makkah, Saudi Arabia.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and dark blue supports.

fullText:
Factory Coaster is a steel spinning wild mouse indoor roller coaster currently located at Moon Toon in Jeddah, Makkah, Saudi Arabia.



Yellow track and dark blue supports.
